title: Competitor EDA — CSV Export
summary: Add a CSV export button to AnalyticsPage that downloads the current summary table as a .csv file. No new API endpoint required — data is derived client-side from payload.summary.

in: Export button in the Competitors table header (Zone 3)
Filename encodes the active date range: competitors-{from}-{to}.csv
Blob + <a download> pattern — no server round-trip

ux.button_location: Competitors section header, right side (next to the 'All authors' clear link)
ux.button_disabled_when: payload is null or payload.summary is empty
ux.filename_pattern: competitors-{from}-{to}.csv where from/to are the active YYYY-MM-DD filter values

csv_format.quoting: quote fields containing commas or quotes; double-escape embedded quotes

acceptance: Button renders in Zone 3 header when payload is loaded
Button is disabled/hidden when payload is null
Clicking downloads a file named competitors-{from}-{to}.csv
CSV has header row matching column spec
CSV rows match payload.summary in order
No new API endpoints or files added
